shortCompanyReason: KaarbonTech is a well-regarded provider of drainage surveying solutions with supportive and growth-oriented culture.
shortRoleReason: The role offers hands-on field surveying, nationwide travel, and the chance to contribute to vital infrastructure projects.
advertSummary: KaarbonTech seeks a Highways Drainage Surveyor to collect, measure, photograph, and report on drainage assets using field technology. The role involves nationwide travel, physical activity, and a competitive salary up to £46,000 with benefits and training provided.
personalisedIntro: Experienced in field surveying and infrastructure data collection, ready to deliver accurate drainage surveys and support KaarbonTech’s nationwide projects.
whyThisRole: This position combines on-site surveying with advanced technology, providing opportunities for travel, professional growth, and contributing to essential UK infrastructure.
